name: outward-copy-quality-gate
description: Routes outward-facing copy through bundled copy-owner, Humanizer, and Ogilvy guidance without blocking the user turn.

interface.shortDescription: Route public copy through three bundled review skills
interface.longDescription: Detect configured outward-facing copy families and inject exact, bounded copy-router, Humanizer, and Ogilvy instructions in the same turn. Errors fail open with recovery guidance; the plugin never blocks prompt submission or completion.
defaultPrompt: Rewrite this README headline so it is clear and searchable.
Improve this public product description without adding hype.
Review this onboarding copy before I publish it.
